# Strait — Comprehensive Product Documentation

> For a quick summary, see: https://trystrait.ai/llms.txt

Strait is an AI-powered writing platform built on a conversation-first workflow. Instead of starting with a blank document, users begin with an AI interview that gathers context about purpose, audience, key points, and tone — then generates multiple draft angles for the user to refine.

Website: https://trystrait.ai
App: https://app.trystrait.ai
Version: 2.0
Last updated: 2025-02-07

---

## 1. Product Overview

### Mission

Help writers worldwide produce better content faster by replacing the blank page with a guided AI conversation.

### Target Market

- Content creators and bloggers
- Marketing teams and copywriters
- Freelance writers managing multiple clients
- Non-native English speakers
- Anyone who writes professionally

### Key Differentiators

1. **Conversation-first**: Writing begins with an AI interview, not a blank page.
2. **Multiple draft angles**: Every session produces 3 distinct content approaches.
3. **Style profiles**: Capture and replicate your unique writing voice across sessions.
4. **10 content types**: Specialized prompts for blog posts, social media, emails, and more.
5. **Real-time sync**: Convex-powered reactive queries for instant updates across devices.

---

## 2. Core Features

### 2.1 Conversation-First Writing

The core workflow replaces the blank page with a structured AI conversation:

1. **Interview phase**: An AI interviewer asks about purpose, audience, key points, and tone.
2. **Draft generation**: The writing assistant generates 3 distinct draft angles based on the brief.
3. **Refinement**: Users chat with the AI to adjust tone, restructure, or request changes.
4. **Completion**: Final draft is saved to the editor for manual polishing and export.

**Draft angle examples:**
- Hook-First: Opens with a compelling hook or question
- Story-Led: Begins with a narrative or anecdote
- Data-Driven: Leads with statistics or research

### 2.2 Content Types

10 built-in content types with specialized angle prompts and few-shot examples:

| # | Type | Description |
|---|------|-------------|
| 1 | Blog Post | Long-form articles with SEO-friendly structure |
| 2 | Twitter Thread | Multi-tweet threads with hooks and engagement |
| 3 | LinkedIn Post | Professional content with thought leadership angle |
| 4 | Follow-Up Email | Business emails with clear CTAs |
| 5 | Article | In-depth pieces with research and analysis |
| 6 | Newsletter | Subscriber-focused content with sections |
| 7 | Product Description | Feature-benefit copy for products |
| 8 | Ad Copy | Short-form persuasive content |
| 9 | Press Release | Formal announcements with quotes |
| 10 | Custom | Freeform content with user-defined parameters |

### 2.3 Style Profiles

Users can define and save their writing voice:

- **Voice presets**: Formality scale (1-5) and energy scale (1-5)
- **Sample texts**: Upload reference writing for AI to match
- **Custom instructions**: Specific style rules the AI should follow
- **Per-session binding**: Apply any profile to any writing session

### 2.4 Style Analysis

Analyze existing writing to understand style characteristics:

- **Document upload**: PDFs, text files, Markdown
- **URL extraction**: Provide a URL and Strait extracts text for analysis
- **Paste content**: Direct text input for quick analysis
- **AI analysis**: Automated breakdown of voice, formality, energy, and patterns

### 2.5 Rich Text Editor

Tiptap-powered editor with 20+ extensions:

- Text formatting: Bold, italic, underline, strikethrough
- Headings: H1-H6
- Lists: Ordered, unordered, task lists
- Code blocks with syntax highlighting
- Blockquotes and horizontal rules
- Images (inline and block)
- Links with preview
- Text alignment
- Subscript/superscript
- Highlight colors
- Typography enhancements
- Character and word count
- Auto-save with debounce (1.5 seconds)
- Reading time estimates

### 2.6 Workspaces and Organization

- **Multi-workspace support**: Separate workspaces for different projects or clients
- **Color coding**: Assign colors and icons to workspaces
- **Nested folders**: Organize documents within workspaces
- **Custom tags**: Color-coded tags with usage tracking
- **Default workspace**: Auto-assign new sessions
- **Workspace archiving**: Archive completed projects

### 2.7 BYOK (Bring Your Own Key)

8 AI providers supported — use the default or bring your own API keys:

| Provider | Default Model | Notes |
|----------|---------------|-------|
| xAI (default) | grok-4-1-fast | Default provider, no key needed |
| OpenAI | gpt-4o | GPT-4 and GPT-4 Turbo available |
| Anthropic | claude-3-7-sonnet | Claude family |
| Google | gemini-2.5-flash | Gemini Pro and Flash |
| Groq | llama-3.1-70b | Fast inference |
| Together AI | Llama-3.3-70B | Open-source models |
| Perplexity | sonar-pro | Search-augmented |
| DeepSeek | deepseek-chat | Cost-effective |

---

## 3. Pricing

### Plans

| Feature | Personal | Pro |
|---------|----------|-----|
| Monthly price | $30/mo | $50/mo |
| Yearly price | $24/mo | $40/mo |
| Sessions per month | 50 | 150 |
| Messages per session | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| Style profiles | 5 | Unlimited |
| Workspaces | 3 | Unlimited |
| Drafts per session | 3 | 5 |
| Languages | All 50+ | All 50+ |
| Support | Email (48h) | Priority (12h) |
| Early access | — | ✓ |

### Billing

- Managed through Polar
- Monthly and yearly billing cycles
- Yearly billing saves ~20%
- Customer portal for subscription management

---

## 4. AI Capabilities

### 4.1 Interviewer Agent

The interviewer agent conducts a structured conversation to build a writing brief:

- Asks about purpose, audience, key points, and tone
- Adapts questions based on content type
- Builds a complete brief before triggering draft generation
- Supports follow-up questions for clarification

### 4.2 Writing Assistant Agent

The writing assistant generates and refines content:

- Produces 3 distinct draft angles per session
- Each angle has a unique approach (e.g., Hook-First, Story-Led, Data-Driven)
- Supports iterative refinement through chat
- Adapts to style profiles when bound to a session
- Respects content type constraints and formatting

### 4.3 Session State Machine

Full XState state machine managing the writing workflow:

```
idle → interview → drafts → refinement → completion
```

- **idle**: Session created, waiting to start
- **interview**: AI interviewer gathering brief
- **drafts**: Writing assistant generating 3 angles
- **refinement**: User refining selected draft through chat
- **completion**: Final draft saved to editor

### 4.4 Memory Integration

Optional Mem0 integration for conversational memory:

- Remembers writing preferences across sessions
- Learns from past interactions
- Feature-flagged (degrades gracefully without API key)

---

## 5. Technical Stack

### Frontend

- TanStack Start (React 19 + Vite)
- TanStack Router (file-based routing)
- TanStack Query (data fetching and caching)
- Tiptap (rich text editor)
- Tailwind CSS 4
- Framer Motion (animations)
- Zustand (state management)
- XState (session lifecycle)

### Backend

- Convex (real-time database with reactive queries)
- Convex Agent (AI agent framework)
- Better Auth (authentication with Google OAuth)
- Polar (subscription billing)
- Vercel AI SDK v6 (streaming AI responses)

### Infrastructure

- Vercel (hosting)
- Cloudflare (WAF and DDoS protection)
- Infisical (secrets management)
- Sentry (error tracking)
- PostHog (product analytics)

### Build Tools

- Turborepo (monorepo management)
- Bun (package manager and runtime)
- Biome (linting and formatting)
- TypeScript (strict mode)

---

## 6. Security

- **Input sanitization**: Detects SQL injection, XSS, command injection, path traversal, prompt injection, and encoding attacks
- **Rate limiting**: Per-user limits on session creation, messaging, draft generation, and file uploads
- **Threat logging**: All detected security threats logged with risk levels
- **User isolation**: Every query and mutation filters by authenticated userId
- **Authentication**: Better Auth with Google OAuth
- **Infrastructure**: Cloudflare WAF and DDoS protection

---

## 7. Use Cases

### Content Creators

- Start blog posts with an AI interview instead of staring at a blank page
- Generate 3 different angles for the same topic
- Apply consistent style profiles across all content
- Export to Markdown for CMS publishing

### Marketing Teams

- Produce ad copy, product descriptions, and press releases at scale
- Maintain brand voice with shared style profiles
- Organize campaigns in workspaces with folders and tags
- Generate social media content (Twitter threads, LinkedIn posts)

### Freelance Writers

- Manage multiple client projects with separate workspaces
- Create client-specific style profiles
- Track writing sessions and output
- Export in client-preferred formats (PDF, DOCX, Markdown)

### Non-Native Speakers

- Write confidently in 50+ languages
- AI understands grammar rules and cultural context
- Automatic language detection
- RTL text support for Arabic, Hebrew, etc.

---

## 8. Competitive Position

| Competitor | Strait Advantage |
|------------|-------------------|
| Blank page | Replaces with guided AI conversation |
| ChatGPT | Purpose-built for writing with structured interviews and style profiles |
| Grammarly | Goes beyond corrections to generate full drafts |
| Jasper | Conversation-first approach vs. template-based generation |
| Copy.ai | Style analysis and voice matching vs. generic templates |
| Notion AI | Dedicated writing workflow vs. general-purpose assistant |
